def eligible_for_marriage_license(self) -> bool:
        if (self.age >= 18 and
                self.employment_status in ['employed', 'retired', 'student'] and
                self.education in ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and
                self.marital_status in ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']):
            return True
        else:
            return False
